title: Plan primitives: loadPlan + listPlans + validatePlans + renderPlan + tools + subcommands
body: Step 5. Symmetric to issue-084 for plans. loadPlan(cwd, planId) returning PlanView with topo-sorted items resolved via existing resolveItemById, validatePlans(cwd) emitting plan_ref_unresolved | plan_dep_missing | plan_item_cycle | plan_roadmap_missing | plan_phase_missing | plan_status_inconsistent. Subcommands: /project plan-{list,view,validate}. Tools: project-plan-{load,render,validate,list}. renderPlan emits ordered numbered list grouped by topo-order strata + mermaid 'graph TD' for dependency graph + status rollup summary header.
